hooks.command: fp="$(jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty)')"; case "$fp" in */docs/survey/*.md) printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"你刚修改了 docs/survey 章节。请同步检查 docs/survey/README.md 和 docs/survey/survey-map.md 是否需要更新。"}}' ;; esac
hooks.statusMessage: 检查 survey 同步提醒

hooks.command: fp="$(jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty)')"; case "$fp" in */ref/paper/*|*/ref/blog/*|*/ref/DeepResearch/*) printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"你刚修改了 ref 材料层。请考虑运行 uv run --active python -m src.references 以重建 references 索引。"}}' ;; esac
hooks.statusMessage: 检查 references 重建提醒

hooks.command: fp="$(jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty)')"; case "$fp" in */docs/plans/*.md|*/docs/architecture/*.md) printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"你刚新增或重写了正式工件。请检查命名、位置与边界是否符合 AGENTS.md 和 docs/method/README.md。"}}' ;; esac
hooks.statusMessage: 检查正式工件规则提醒
